title: juniperus deppeana subsp. robusta
intro: Juniperus deppeana subsp. robusta, also known as the Mexican Juniper, is a subspecies of evergreen tree that belongs to the cypress family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a popular herbal remedy. Juniperus deppeana subsp. robusta can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
